description:
New recovery phase: lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/materializer_bootstrap_phase.ex

Bootstrap the metadata shard materializer:
1. Find running materializer in available_services
2. If not found, restore from ObjectStorage snapshot (uses Olivine.Logic.maybe_load_snapshot)
3. If fresh cluster, create initial shard layout in memory

Query materializer for shard layout via get_range on \xff/system/shard_keys/*.

Returns next phase: CommitProxyStartupPhase
title: Add MaterializerBootstrapPhase
